h1: AI Automation for Real Estate Agencies
description: Stop losing properties and clients to slow response times. We build AI infrastructure that qualifies buyers, schedules viewings automatically, and drafts personalized follow-ups, allowing your agents to focus purely on closing deals.
metaDescription: AI automation services for real estate. Automate lead qualification, property viewings, and CRM data entry to close more deals faster.
challenges: Inbound leads from Zillow/Realtor.com go cold if not answered within 5 minutes.
Agents spend 40% of their day manually updating CRM records and scheduling viewings.
Following up with open-house attendees is manual, inconsistent, and slow.
solutions: Deploy a 24/7 WhatsApp AI Agent that instantly answers property questions and qualifies budget.
Automate calendar syncs so leads can book property viewings without human intervention.
Implement a post-open-house AI sequence that texts attendees and gauges their interest level.

useCases.problem: Leads inquiring about properties at 11 PM and going to a competitor who responds first the next morning.
useCases.solution: WhatsApp AI responds instantly, checks MLS data for property availability, asks for pre-approval status, and books a call for 9 AM.
useCases.stack: WhatsApp API + Follow Up Boss + OpenAI

useCases.problem: Agents forgetting to log phone calls and notes into the CRM.
useCases.solution: AI call recorder transcribes agent phone calls, summarizes the buyer's preferences, and updates the CRM record automatically.
useCases.result: Perfect CRM data hygiene without agent effort.

caseStudy.before: A luxury brokerage in Miami was generating 500 leads a month but only converting 2% because agents were too busy showing houses to reply to new inquiries quickly.
caseStudy.implementation: We deployed an omnichannel AI agent connected to their MLS feed and Follow Up Boss CRM. The agent engaged leads via SMS within 30 seconds, answering specific questions about HOA fees, square footage, and school districts based on live MLS data.
caseStudy.after: Lead conversion increased to 5.5%. The brokerage closed an additional ₹996M in volume in Q3 solely attributed to the AI handling initial qualification.

eeat: Deep integrations with industry-standard tools: Follow Up Boss, kvCORE, Lofty, and direct MLS API feeds.
We understand Fair Housing laws; our LLMs are hardcoded with guardrails to never violate regulatory compliance.
Our automation architects have built workflows for Top 100 RE/MAX and Keller Williams teams.

faq.question: Can the AI pull live property data?
faq.answer: Yes. We integrate directly with your local MLS or CRM via API. If a lead asks 'Is 123 Main St still available?', the AI checks the database in real-time before answering.

faq.question: Will my agents lose their personal touch?
faq.answer: No. The AI handles the robotic work—scheduling, basic Q&A, and data entry. This gives your agents MORE time to provide the high-touch, personal relationship building that actually sells houses.

description: Reduce administrative overhead so your providers can focus on patient care. We deploy secure, HIPAA-compliant AI systems to automate patient scheduling, intake forms, and EMR data entry.
metaDescription: Healthcare AI automation services. Automate patient booking, EMR data entry, and patient follow-ups with secure, HIPAA-compliant AI.
challenges: Front desk staff spend 60% of their day on the phone managing appointments and cancellations.
Manual data entry from patient intake forms into the EMR leads to costly transcription errors.
High patient no-show rates drain clinical revenue.
solutions: Deploy an AI voice and text agent to handle 24/7 appointment scheduling and rescheduling.
Implement Intelligent Document Processing (OCR) to automatically digitize intake forms into the EMR.
Create automated SMS sequences to confirm appointments and provide pre-visit instructions.

useCases.problem: Dental clinic losing ₹4,15,000/week due to last-minute patient cancellations.
useCases.solution: When a cancellation text is received, the AI automatically texts patients on the waitlist offering the open slot.
useCases.result: Recaptured 85% of cancelled appointments within 10 minutes.
useCases.stack: Twilio SMS + Custom API + Open Dental

useCases.problem: Nurses spending 2 hours a day manually typing faxed referral documents into Epic.
useCases.solution: AI vision model reads the fax, extracts patient demographics and medical history, and stages it in the EMR for 1-click approval.
useCases.result: Saved 10 hours per week per nurse.

caseStudy.before: A network of physical therapy clinics was overwhelmed by 400+ daily phone calls. Wait times averaged 12 minutes, leading to abandoned calls and lost new patients.
caseStudy.implementation: We deployed a HIPAA-compliant AI Voice Agent using Twilio and a secure, private LLM. The agent answered instantly, triaged the reason for the call, and booked new evaluations directly into their EMR via API.
caseStudy.after: Hold times dropped to zero. The clinic captured 40 additional new patient evaluations per month that were previously abandoning the call, adding roughly ₹49,80,000 in monthly top-line revenue.

eeat: We utilize strictly HIPAA-compliant infrastructure (e.g., Google Cloud Healthcare API, AWS HealthLake, Enterprise OpenAI with zero-retention).
We sign Business Associate Agreements (BAAs) for all healthcare deployments.
Deep integration experience with Epic, Cerner, Athenahealth, and Open Dental.

faq.question: Is the AI allowed to give medical advice?
faq.answer: Absolutely not. We hardcode strict guardrails. If a patient asks a medical question, the AI is programmed to immediately route the inquiry to a triage nurse.

faq.question: Is patient data used to train the AI?
faq.answer: No. We use Enterprise API endpoints that strictly prohibit the use of your data for model training. All Protected Health Information (PHI) is processed ephemerally.

title: E-Commerce
description: Scale your e-commerce operations without scaling your headcount. We automate customer support, inventory management, and personalized marketing so you can focus on brand growth.
metaDescription: E-commerce AI automation. Automate customer support, inventory syncing, and personalized marketing for your Shopify or WooCommerce store.
challenges: Customer support is overwhelmed with repetitive 'Where is my order?' (WISMO) tickets.
Manual inventory syncing between Shopify, Amazon, and 3PLs causes stockouts.
Abandoned cart recovery emails are generic and convert poorly.
solutions: Deploy an AI Support Agent that integrates with Shopify/ShipStation to answer WISMO queries instantly.
Build custom Make.com workflows to sync inventory across all sales channels in real-time.
Use AI to generate hyper-personalized SMS and email campaigns based on browsing behavior.

useCases.problem: During Q4, support team cannot handle the 3x spike in return requests.
useCases.solution: AI agent authenticates the user, checks the return window policy, generates a return label via the Loop API, and issues store credit automatically.
useCases.result: Zero manual touches required for 90% of standard returns.
useCases.stack: Gorgias + Custom AI + Loop Returns + Shopify

useCases.problem: Marketing team spending hours manually creating product descriptions for 1000s of SKUs.
useCases.solution: Automated pipeline pulls product specs from the manufacturer database, uses an LLM to write SEO-optimized descriptions in the brand's voice, and pushes to Shopify.
useCases.result: Catalog updated in 2 hours instead of 3 weeks.

caseStudy.before: A DTC apparel brand was paying a CX agency ₹12,45,000/month. 70% of their tickets were simple sizing questions or shipping status checks.
caseStudy.implementation: We deployed an AI agent directly into their Shopify chat widget. We ingested their sizing charts and connected the agent to their ShipBob API. The agent visually guided users to the right size and provided live tracking links.
caseStudy.after: The brand reduced their CX agency retainer to ₹3,32,000/month. Customer satisfaction (CSAT) actually increased because shoppers got answers at 2 AM instantly.

eeat: Extensive experience with the modern DTC stack: Shopify Plus, Klaviyo, Gorgias, ShipBob, and Recharge.
We build robust webhook architectures that handle massive Q4/Black Friday traffic spikes without dropping payloads.
Focus on brand voice. We fine-tune prompts so the AI speaks exactly like your brand, not a corporate robot.

faq.question: Will the AI give out incorrect discount codes?
faq.answer: No. The AI's access to discounts is strictly controlled via API. It can only issue single-use, dynamically generated codes from Shopify if the user meets specific rule-based criteria.

faq.question: Can it handle multi-lingual support for international expansion?
faq.answer: Yes. Our AI agents can seamlessly detect the user's language and converse fluently in over 50 languages, pulling from your English knowledge base and translating contextually.

h1: AI Workflow Automation for Finance Firms
description: Financial operations are bogged down by manual document review and data entry. We engineer secure AI pipelines to automate invoice processing, client onboarding, and financial reporting.
metaDescription: AI automation for accounting and finance. Automate invoice processing (OCR), client onboarding, and secure data entry.
challenges: Accountants spend hours manually typing invoice data into QuickBooks or Xero.
Client onboarding (KYC/AML) involves endless manual document verification.
Consolidating data from multiple bank feeds for reporting is slow and error-prone.
solutions: Deploy Intelligent Document Processing (IDP) to extract line-item data from invoices automatically.
Automate the KYC process with AI vision models that verify IDs against client records.
Build custom API scripts to pull data from Plaid/banks and generate automated financial summaries.

useCases.problem: CPA firm drowning in disorganized client receipts during tax season.
useCases.solution: Clients upload photos to a portal; AI extracts the vendor, amount, date, and tax category, then stages the transaction in QuickBooks.
useCases.result: Saved 500+ billable hours during the tax season peak.
useCases.stack: Custom Portal + Google Document AI + QuickBooks API

useCases.problem: Wealth management firm taking 2 weeks to onboard a new high-net-worth client.
useCases.solution: Automated workflow triggers via DocuSign, provisions the client portal, runs automated background API checks, and alerts the advisor.
useCases.result: Onboarding reduced from 14 days to 48 hours.
useCases.stack: DocuSign + Custom API + Salesforce Financial Services Cloud

caseStudy.before: A regional bank's loan processing department was manually reviewing 200-page PDF loan applications to extract 15 specific data points. Turnaround time was 4 days.
caseStudy.implementation: We deployed a custom RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) pipeline using Enterprise Claude 3.5. The system ingests the 200-page PDF, instantly extracts the 15 data points, and outputs them into a structured JSON file pushed directly to their underwriting software.
caseStudy.after: Data extraction time went from 45 minutes per application to 30 seconds. The bank accelerated loan approvals, capturing market share from slower competitors.

eeat: We utilize SOC2 Type II compliant infrastructure and Enterprise LLM agreements with zero data-retention policies.
Extensive experience working with Plaid, Stripe, QuickBooks, Xero, and NetSuite APIs.
We implement strict 'Human-in-the-Loop' protocols for any money-moving or final-approval workflows.

faq.question: Is cloud AI safe for sensitive financial data?
faq.answer: Yes, provided it is architected correctly. We never use public LLMs (like standard ChatGPT). We use enterprise-grade endpoints (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud) that are legally bound by SOC2 and do not use your data for model training.

faq.question: Can AI catch fraudulent invoices?
faq.answer: Yes. We can program the AI to cross-reference invoice details against historical vendor data, flagging anomalies in bank routing numbers or unusual amounts for human review.

description: Increase your agency's profit margins by automating client reporting, content generation, and lead outreach. Scale your MRR without increasing your headcount.
metaDescription: AI automation for marketing agencies. Automate client reporting, content workflows, and outbound lead generation to increase profit margins.
challenges: Account managers spend 10+ hours a month manually building performance reports for clients.
Content teams face bottlenecks generating initial drafts for blogs, ad copy, and social media.
The agency's own outbound lead generation is inconsistent due to client work taking priority.
solutions: Build automated data pipelines to pull metrics from Meta/Google Ads and auto-generate client presentation decks.
Deploy custom AI agents trained on the client's brand voice to rapidly generate first-draft content.
Implement a fully automated outbound B2B lead generation engine to keep the agency pipeline full.

useCases.problem: Performance marketing agency spending 40 hours the first week of every month building reports.
useCases.solution: Make.com workflow pulls data from Google Ads/Meta APIs, uses OpenAI to write a 'Performance Summary' paragraph, and pushes it into a Google Slide template.
useCases.result: Reports are generated automatically on the 1st of the month; Account Managers just review and send.

useCases.problem: SEO agency struggling to scale content production without hiring expensive writers.
useCases.solution: Multi-agent workflow researches SERP competitors, generates an outline, and drafts a 2,000-word article formatted in markdown.
useCases.result: Human editors focus on polishing and EEAT injection rather than writing from scratch, doubling output.

caseStudy.before: A boutique PR agency wanted to scale but the founders were entirely bogged down in operations. Every new client required manual Slack channel creation, Google Drive folder setup, and onboarding emails.
caseStudy.implementation: We built a 1-click onboarding automation. When a Stripe invoice is paid, the system automatically creates the Slack Connect channel, sets up the Drive architecture with templates, adds the client to ClickUp, and sends the welcome sequence.
caseStudy.after: Onboarding time dropped from 2 hours to 5 seconds. The founders reclaimed 15 hours a week, allowing them to focus entirely on closing new accounts.

eeat: We understand agency operations intimately. We've built workflows for SEO, Performance, PR, and Web Development agencies.
Deep expertise with agency stacks: GoHighLevel, ClickUp, Monday.com, Slack, and Stripe.
We focus on 'White-Label' ready infrastructure that agencies can resell to their own clients.

faq.question: Will AI content hurt our clients' SEO?
faq.answer: Raw AI content can. That's why we build workflows where AI generates the *first draft* or the research brief. The human editor always adds the final polish, personal anecdotes, and EEAT signals required to rank.

faq.question: Can we white-label your automation services?
faq.answer: Yes. Many agencies partner with us. We build the complex backend automation, and you sell the 'AI Transformation' directly to your clients at a markup.
